betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Health Hazards§f

§aCoal dust, asbestos, and other airborne hazards can cripple you. Protect your lungs early.§f

NTM adds several lung diseases that accumulate over time:

§6Black Lung§f
Caused by §bcoal dust§f from mining coal ore and handling coal items. Builds up to 72000, then kills. At high levels it causes weakness and coughing.
§bPrevention:§f Wear a gas mask with Airborne Particles filter. A simple §bCrude Protective Mask§f (damp cloth from wool + string soaked in water) is enough.
§bCure:§f SiOX Cancer Medication or herbal paste (resets to 50%, then heals over ~1 hour).

§6Mesothelioma§f
Caused by §basbestos§f particles. Builds to 72000, then kills with "entitled to financial compensation".
§bPrevention:§f Gas mask with Particulates filter (gas mask filter, combo filter). A crude mask won't stop asbestos.
§bCure:§f Same as Black Lung.

§6Tip§f: Craft a crude protective mask before you start mining coal in bulk — it's cheap and prevents a lot of suffering.
